results.title: NSF Certified For Sport
results.content: Treat your body to the highest standard with Thorne’s NSF Certified for Sport®. Try Thorne’s suite of NSF Certified for Sport supplements and enjoy the following benefits. NSF Certified for Sport® supplements from Thorne are safer and more effective way to obtain the nutritional support you need to help maintain or regain your vitality. Thorne’s NSF Certified for Sport® products are formulated to give you the boost you need to achieve your exercise goals. That’s why some of the best supplements for performance concentrate on replenishing lost electrolytes. Your body aims to maintain an optimal balance of electrolytes, so give it the help it needs with an electrolyte supplement. Make the switch from sports drinks with high sugar content and heavy caffeine levels to Thorne’s Catalyte, an electrolyte supplement for sports performance. High-performance athletes require even more protein to ensure their bodies have the building blocks for strength, muscle repair, and effective recovery from a workout. That’s where a protein powder supplement like Thorne’s Whey Protein can fill the gap.

results.title: What NSF Certified Means for Supplements and Why ...
results.content: NSF independently certifies nutritional supplement manufacturers as meeting GMP requirements ‒ as listed in Section 8 of NSF/ANSI 173, which is the only American National Standard in the nutritional supplement industry developed in accordance with Title 21, Part 111, of the Code of Federal Regulations (the FDA’s GMPs). The GMP NSF certificate means that a manufacturing facility, like Thorne’s, has the appropriate facilities, equipment, standard operating procedures, employee training, and quality controls in place to ensure that high-quality nutritional supplements are being manufactured. After a supplement manufacturing facility is NSF certified, the nutritional supplements made at that facility are eligible for additional certification through the NSF Certified for Sport® program. **Can anyone take a Thorne NSF-certified supplement?**. At Thorne, we are proud that our manufacturing facility and the selected nutritional supplements we make meet the requirements of the NSF Certified for Sport® program.
